title: Levelling Up Fund process evaluation: phase 1
body: "This report presents emerging findings from the first phase of the Levelling Up Fund (LUF) process evaluation. It explores how funding was awarded and how projects have been mobilised and delivered across Rounds 1 to 3. The report aims to support learning for current and future funding programmes. It includes lessons on application processes, delivery challenges, and local capacity. A second phase of evaluation will follow. "
